intent: Implement the Phase 1 agentic orchestrator foundation inside GHDP so repo-level skills, plugins, sub-agents, and native memory handling work through one consistent orchestration framework. Establish the baseline contracts, repo-local runtime layout under .ghdp, and human/agent-consumable guidance needed to make the orchestrator trustworthy, practical, and testable today without depending on later external memory integrations.
summary:
Objective
Make this ticket the primary implementation source for the orchestrator agentic framework foundation in GHDP CLI.

Scope
- define and implement the framework baseline for skills orchestration
- define and implement plugin integration patterns for agent workflows
- define and implement sub-agent role model, invocation flow, and handoff contracts
- implement non-library/native memory handling required for baseline orchestration behavior
- provide documentation and usage flow consumable by both humans and coding agents

Out of Scope
- external memory-system integration (Graphify/Mem0), which is tracked separately in EPPE-7581 and should plug into this framework later

Deliverables
- framework design and implementation notes
- agent-consumable run instructions and human-readable operator guide
- validation checklist for skills/plugins/sub-agent orchestration and native memory behavior

Acceptance Criteria
- skills, plugins, and sub-agent orchestration are usable through a consistent framework path
- native memory handling works for the baseline agentic flow without external memory dependencies
- framework docs clearly separate current baseline capabilities from later EPPE-7581 integration work
